content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Best_of_2010.jpg|thumb|300px|The best of 2010]]
A list of events in '''2010''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[Grievous Intrigue]]" and "[[The Deserter]]" aired.
*01 – ''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Heroes]]'' released.
*[[January 6|06]] – [[The Clone Wars 12|''The Clone Wars'' 12]] released.
*[[January 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.3|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.3]] published.
*07 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Day One]]'' released.
*[[January 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 8: Destroyer]]'' released.
*13 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Shadows of the Empire]]'' released.
*[[January 14|14]] – [[Mark Jones]] dies.
*[[January 19|19]] – ''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' released.
*[[January 20|20]] – [[Dark Times 15|''Dark Times'' 15]] released.
*20 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 49|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 49]] released.
*[[January 22|22]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Lightsaber Lost]]" aired.
*22 – ''[[Timeline 6: Onslaught of the Sith Empire]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[January 26|26]] – ''[[Crosscurrent]]'' released.
*26 – [[Star Wars Insider 115|''Star Wars Insider'' 115]] published.
*26 – [[The Dark Times|''Star Wars Miniatures: The Dark Times'']] released.
*[[January 27|27]] – [[Legacy (2006) 44|''Legacy'' (2006) 44]] released.
*[[January 28|28]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Crisis on Coruscant]]'' released.
*28 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army]]'' released.
*28 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Stand Aside - Bounty Hunters!]]'' released.
*28 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Holocron Hunters]]'' released.
*[[January 29|29]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Mandalore Plot]]" aired.

==February==
*[[February 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Luke Skywalker and the Treasure of the Dragonsnakes]]'' released.
*[[February 4|04]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.4|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.4]] published.
*[[February 5|05]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Voyage of Temptation]]" aired.
*[[February 10|10]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Paragon]]'' released.
*10 – [[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 8: Tatooine]]'' released.
*[[February 12|12]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Duchess of Mandalore]]" aired.
*[[February 13|13]] – [[Gareth Wigan]] dies.
*[[February 17|17]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 50|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 50]] released.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[2010 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 5|2010 Topps ''Star Wars Galaxy'' Series 5]] released.
*[[February 23|23]] – ''[[Clone Wars Gambit: Stealth]]'' released.
*[[February 24|24]] – [[Legacy (2006) 45|''Legacy'' (2006) 45]] released.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Richard Devon]] dies.
*26 – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender]]'' webcomic concludes.

==March==
*[[March 4|04]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.5|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.5]] published.
*[[March 5|05]] – ''[[The Written Word]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] article published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[March 9|09]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' released.
*09 – ''[[Point Blank]]'' published on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[March 10|10]] – [[Ryan Kiera Armstrong]] is born.
*[[March 12|12]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Senate Murders]]" first aired in Canada.
*[[March 13|13]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Senate Murders]]" aired in the UK.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Insider 116|''Star Wars Insider'' 116]] published.
*16 – ''[[Threat of the Conqueror]]'', the sixth expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]] released.
*[[March 19|19]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Senate Murders]]" aired in the US.
*[[March 20|20]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Cat and Mouse]]" first aired in the UK.
*[[March 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Boba Fett]]'' released.
*[[March 25|25]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard]]'' released exclusively on StarWars.com.
*[[March 26|26]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Cat and Mouse]]" aired in the US.
*[[March 27|27]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Bounty Hunters (episode)|Bounty Hunters]]" aired in the UK.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]] released.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.6|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.6]]
*01 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Children of the Force]]'' released.
*[[April 2|02]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Bounty Hunters (episode)|Bounty Hunters]]" aired in the US.
*[[April 3|03]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Zillo Beast]]" aired in the UK.
*[[April 6|06]] – [[Masters of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Star Wars Miniatures: Masters of the Force'']] released.
*[[April 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge: The Hidden Blade]]'' released.
*[[April 9|09]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Zillo Beast]]" aired in the US.
*[[April 10|10]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Zillo Beast Strikes Back]]" aired in the UK.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Respawn Entertainment]] is founded.
*[[April 14|14]] – [[Dark Times 16|''Dark Times'' 16]] released.
*[[April 16|16]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Zillo Beast Strikes Back]]" aired in the US.
*16 – ''[[Timeline 7: Peace for the Republic?]]'' released on StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com.
*[[April 17|17]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Death Trap]]" aired in the UK.
*[[April 20|20]] – ''[[The Unknown Regions]]'' released.
*[[April 23|23]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Death Trap]]" aired in the US.
*23 – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 1: Shades of the Sith]]'' starts publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*23 – [[Eiji Kusuhara]] dies.
*[[April 24|24]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[R2 Come Home]]" aired in the UK.
*[[April 27|27]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' paperback released.
*27 – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Savior]]'' released.
*27 – ''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]'' released.
*27 – [[Star Wars Insider 117|''Star Wars Insider'' 117]] published.
*27 – [[Kyriana Kratter]] is born.
*[[April 28|28]] – [[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 1—Refugees|''Star Wars: Invasion: Refugees'' trade paperback]] released.
*28 – [[Legacy (2006) 47|''Legacy'' (2006) 47]] released.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.7|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.7]] published.
*29 – [[The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|''The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol'']] published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[April 30|30]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[R2 Come Home]]" aired in the US and "[[Lethal Trackdown]]" first aired.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Head-to-Head]]'' released.
*[[May 7|07]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[May 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Scanimation Book]]'' released.
*[[May 13|13]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett]]'' released.
*[[May 14|14]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 1: Shades of the Sith]]'' finishes publishing online.
*[[May 21|21]] – 30th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
*21-[[May 23|23]] – The eleventh [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[May 25|25]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' released.
*25 – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' paperback released.
*[[May 26|26]] – [[Legacy (2006) 48|''Legacy'' (2006) 48]] released.
*26 – [[Invasion: Rescues 1|''Invasion: Rescues'' 1]] released.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.8|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.8]] published.
*[[May 28|28]]-[[May 30|30]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[May 31|31]] – ''[[Death Star Battles]]'' released.
*31 – ''[[Join the Rebels]]'' released.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Adventures in Hyperspace: Fire Ring Race]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Adventures in Hyperspace: Shinbone Showdown]]'' released.
*[[June 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 1]]'' released.
*[[June 4|04]]-[[June 6|06]], [[June 11|11]]-[[June 13|13]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 11|11]] – ''[[Timeline 8: The Jedi Civil War]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Al Williamson]] dies.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Hope (cinematic trailer)|''Hope'']] trailer released.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 118|''Star Wars Insider'' 118]] published.
*[[June 16|16]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: In Service of the Republic (TPB)|''Star Wars The Clone Wars: In Service of the Republic'' trade paperback]] released.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 9: Demon]]'' released.
*[[June 18|18]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 2: The Broken World]]'' starts publishing online.
*[[June 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' released.
*22 – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]'' paperback released.
*[[June 24|24]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.9|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.9]] published.
*[[June 30|30]] – [[Dark Times 17|''Dark Times'' 17]] released.
*30 – [[Invasion: Rescues 2|''Invasion: Rescues'' 2]] released.
*30 – [[Legacy (2006) 49|''Legacy'' (2006) 49]] released.
*30 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 9: Monster]]'' released.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Padawan Puzzles]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Legacy of Terror]]'' released.
*[[July 6|06]] – ''[[Clone Wars Gambit: Siege]]'' released.
*[[July 7|07]] – ''[[The Old Republic 1: Threat of Peace, Part 1]]'' released.
*[[July 14|14]] – [[Alan Hume]] dies.
*[[July 17|17]] – [[Larry Keith]] dies.
*[[July 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars Blueprints: Rebel Edition]]'' released.
*19 – ''[[Imperial Commando 2]]'' is cancelled.
*[[July 20|20]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' released.
*[[July 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: The Will of Darth Vader]]'' released.
*[[July 22|22]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Hunt for Grievous]]'' released.
*22 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 2: Curse of the Black Hole Pirates]]'' released.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Insider 119|''Star Wars Insider'' 119]] published.
*[[July 28|28]] – [[Invasion: Rescues 3|''Invasion: Rescues'' 3]] released.
*[[July 30|30]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 2: The Broken World]]'' finishes publishing online.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.10|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.10]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2011|''Star Wars'' Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2011]] published.
*[[August 4|04]] – ''[[The Old Republic 2: Threat of Peace, Part 2]]'' released.
*[[August 6|06]] – ''[[Timeline 9: The Mandalorian Wars]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[August 12|12]]-[[August 15|15]] – [[Celebration V]] held.
*12-15 – [[Knight Errant 0|''Knight Errant'' 0]] handed out at Celebration V.
*12 – ''[[Star Wars: Tales from The Clone Wars Webcomic Collection Season 1]]'' debuted.
*[[August 13|13]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 3: Burn the Future]]'' starts publishing online.
*[[August 16|16]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Heroes]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Planets in Peril]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]'' released.
*[[August 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' ended with [[Legacy (2006) 50|''Legacy'' (2006) 50]].
*[[August 25|25]] – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 1|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 1]] released.
*[[August 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: New Battlefronts: The Visual Guide]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Tales from The Clone Wars Webcomic Collection Season 1]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.11|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.11]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Hero of the Confederacy (TPB)|''Star Wars The Clone Wars: Hero of the Confederacy'']] released.
*01 – ''[[The Old Republic 3: Threat of Peace, Part 3]]'' released.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 120|''Star Wars Insider'' 120]] published.
*14 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation]]'' webcomic begins.
*[[September 15|15]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] released.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire Trilogy]]'' released.
*[[September 17|17]] – ''The Clone Wars'': [[The Clone Wars: Season Three|Season Three]] began with the episodes "[[Clone Cadets]]" and "[[ARC Troopers]]."
*[[September 22|22]] – ''[[The Sounds of Star Wars]]'' released.
*22 – [[Jackie Burroughs]] dies.
*[[September 24|24]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Supply Lines]]" aired.
*24 – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 3: Burn the Future]]'' finished publishing online.
*[[September 28|28]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' paperback edition released.
*28 – [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] released.
*[[September 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 2]]'' released.
*29 – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 2|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 2]] released.
*29 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (comic)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' comic]] released.
*29 – [[Invasion: Rescues 4|''Invasion: Rescues'' 4]] released.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Official Episode Guide Series 1 & 2]]'' released.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.12|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.12]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – A special edition of ''[[Star Wars Art: Visions]]'' released.
*01 – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Sphere of Influence]]" aired.
*[[October 5|05]] – The [[The Force Unleashed II (novel)|novelization of ''The Force Unleashed II'']] released.
*[[October 6|06]] – ''[[The Old Republic 4: Blood of the Empire, Part 1]]'' released.
*[[October 7|07]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Republic]]'' published.
*[[October 8|08]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Corruption (episode)|Corruption]]" aired.
*[[October 12|12]] – ''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' released.
*[[October 13|13]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 1|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 1]] released.
*[[October 15|15]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Academy]]" aired.
*15 – ''[[Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[October 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knight Errant: Influx]]'' released online at [[StarWars.com]].
*[[October 25|25]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Purgatory]]'' released.
*[[October 22|22]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Assassin (episode)|Assassin]]" aired.
*[[October 26|26]] – ''[[Death Troopers]]'' paperback released.
*26 – [[Star Wars Insider 121|''Star Wars Insider'' 121]] published.
*26 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Two|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' The Complete Season Two]] released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 3|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 3]] released.
*27 – The Flash-based game [[Escape from Kamino (game)|''Escape from Kamino'']] launches on the official [[Wikipedia:Facebook|Facebook]] page for ''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II''.
*27 – [[Invasion: Rescues 5|''Invasion: Rescues'' 5]] released.
*[[October 28|28]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Republic]]'' released.
*28 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Villains: A Pop-up Storybook]]'' released.
*28 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Comic 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Comic'' 1]] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.13|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.13]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – Trade edition of ''[[Star Wars Art: Visions]]'' released.
*[[November 3|03]] – ''[[The Old Republic 5: Blood of the Empire, Part 2]]'' released.
*[[November 5|05]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Evil Plans]]" aired.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 2|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 2]] released.
*[[November 12|12]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Hunt for Ziro]]" aired.
*12 – ''[[Industrial Light & Magic: Creating the Impossible]]'' airs on [[wikipedia:Starz Encore|Encore]].
*[[November 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume Four—Blue Harvest]]'' released.
*[[November 19|19]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]" aired.
*[[November 23|23]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.14|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.14]] published.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 4|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 4]] released.
*24 – ''[[Air Strike]]'' single-player online flash player game released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[November 27|27]] – [[Irvin Kershner]] dies.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Jon D'Agostino]] dies.
*[[November 30|30]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' released.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Comic 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Comic'' 2]] released.
*[[December 2|02]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Deadly Hands of Shon-Ju]]'' released.
*02 – ''[[The Old Republic 6: Blood of the Empire, Part 3]]'' released.
*02 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Quinlan Vos: Jedi in Darkness]]'' released.
*[[December 3|03]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Pursuit of Peace]]" aired.
*[[December 4|04]] - [[Star Wars: Imperial Academy]] released.
*[[December 8|08]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 3|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 3]] released.
*08 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 10: Extremes]]'' released.
*[[December 10|10]] – ''[[Timeline 11: Rebirth of the Sith Empire]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[December 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 122|''Star Wars Insider'' 122]] published.
*14 – ''[[The Price of Victory]]'', the eighth set in the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]], is released.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Legacy—War 1|''Legacy—War'' 1]] released.
*[[December 17|17]] – ''[[Cad Bane: Jedi Hunter]]'' [[Star Wars video games|online game]] released.
*[[December 19|19]] – ''[[Robot Chicken: Star Wars Episode III]]'' aired.
*[[December 22|22]] – [[Invasion: Rescues 6|''Invasion: Rescues'' 6]] released.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Grant McCune]] dies.
*[[December 28|28]] – [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.15|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.15]] published.

==Unknown==
*[[Magic Leap]] is founded.
